findings.evidence: pointDifference defined in WeilDivisor.lean:369 with its lemma cluster (lines 372-431); the two new lemmas use only `simp [pointDifference, sub_eq_add_neg, ...]` and sit in `namespace WeilDivisor` before `namespace OrderSystem`.
findings.fix: Move both lemmas into TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor.lean next to the existing pointDifference lemma cluster (after line 369, near pointDifference_self / pushforward_pointDifference).
findings.issue: pointDifference_add_pointDifference and pointDifference_swap (lines 38, 44) are generic WeilDivisor-namespace identities about pointDifference with no dependence on the Abel-Jacobi class, picZero, or anything in AbelJacobi.lean; they are broadly useful and belong in an earlier file.

findings.evidence: WeilDivisor.lean:489 `pointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup {x y} (h : w x = w y)` already proves the same membership; the new lemma is `simpa using` it.
findings.fix: Move it to WeilDivisor.lean beside pointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup (line 489), or drop it and inline the existing lemma at the one use site.
findings.issue: basepointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup depends only on weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup and pointDifference (both in WeilDivisor.lean) and is a one-line simpa over the existing pointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup; if kept, it belongs in the earlier file too.

summary: The OrderSystem base-point-change material correctly lives in a new file importing AbelJacobi, but two generic pointDifference lemmas are misplaced: they belong in WeilDivisor.lean next to the existing pointDifference API rather than in a file pulling in the whole Abel-Jacobi stack.
